subject: Sprint planning for next week
preview: Hey team, I've put together the backlog items we need to discuss in our sprint planning session...
body:
Hey team,

I've put together the backlog items we need to discuss in our sprint planning session on Monday. Please review the board before the meeting.

Key items:
- DBAL multi-adapter support
- Email client backend integration
- Workflow engine performance improvements

Let me know if you have anything to add.

Best,
Alice

subject: [metabuilder] PR #847: Fix loadFromDirectory tenantId auto-add
preview: mergify[bot] merged pull request #847. loadFromDirectory() was missing the tenantId field...
body:
mergify[bot] merged pull request #847.

loadFromDirectory() was missing the tenantId field auto-add logic that loadFromFile() already had, causing "Unknown field: tenantId" on all entities using the shorthand convention.

Files changed: 2
Additions: 51
Deletions: 22

subject: Re: Database adapter benchmarks
preview: The PostgreSQL adapter is showing 3x throughput improvement with the new connection pool settings...
body:
The PostgreSQL adapter is showing 3x throughput improvement with the new connection pool settings. Here are the results:

- SQLite: 12,400 ops/sec (dev baseline)
- PostgreSQL: 8,900 ops/sec → 26,700 ops/sec
- MySQL: 7,200 ops/sec (unchanged)

I'll push the config changes to the deployment branch.

Bob

body:

subject: M3 component audit results
preview: Finished the component audit — 167 components across 11 categories. All tests passing...
body:
Finished the component audit — 167 components across 11 categories. All tests passing.

Breakdown:
- Core React: 145 components
- Email: 22 components
- Icons: 421
- SCSS modules: 78

The QML ports are at 104 components. Python bindings cover 15 of the most-used ones.

Carol

subject: New issue: DBAL fetch failed: 422 Unprocessable Entity
preview: A new error was detected in codegen-frontend. fetchFromDBAL threw an error for unknown entity...
body:
A new error was detected in codegen-frontend.

Error: DBAL fetch failed: 422 Unprocessable Entity
File: src/store/middleware/dbalSync.ts:131
Occurrences: 47
Users affected: 3

Stack trace:

loadSettings @ layout.tsx:33
